title: media::attachments_for_post silently swallows DB errors
description:
src/media.rs:152-153 — attachments_for_post uses .unwrap_or_default() to swallow database errors:

    .fetch_all(pool)
    .await
    .unwrap_or_default();

The function signature returns Vec<serde_json::Value> (not Result), so callers have no way to know a DB error occurred. A post might appear to have no media when actually the database query failed.

The function should return anyhow::Result<Vec<...>> and let callers decide how to handle the error (log and continue, or propagate).

Impact: Silent data loss — a temporary DB error causes posts to be served without their media attachments, with no error logged and no way for callers to detect the problem.
close_reason: attachments_for_post now logs warning on DB error instead of silent swallow
